mapper.sql: s.shipment_id, s.po_id, po.po_code, s.shipment_order_id, so.shipment_order_code, s.shipment_status, s.shipment_request_date, s.shipment_due_date, so.shipment_client_name, so.shipment_country, so.shipment_manager_name, so.shipment_item_name, po.po_items_snapshot
mapper.select: SELECT FROM shipments s JOIN purchase_orders po ON s.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN shipment_orders so ON s.shipment_order_id = so.shipment_order_id WHERE s.shipment_id = #{shipmentId}
SELECT FROM shipments s JOIN purchase_orders po ON s.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN shipment_orders so ON s.shipment_order_id = so.shipment_order_id

SELECT FROM shipments s JOIN purchase_orders po ON s.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN shipment_orders so ON s.shipment_order_id = so.shipment_order_id ORDER BY s.shipment_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shipments s JOIN purchase_orders po ON s.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN shipment_orders so ON s.shipment_order_id = so.shipment_order_id
SELECT FROM shipments s JOIN purchase_orders po ON s.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN shipment_orders so ON s.shipment_order_id = so.shipment_order_id WHERE po.po_code = #{poId}
